allowed_roots.purpose: Local instrument exports, photos, worksheets, calibration logs, and bench records for the full H-A matrix.
Local records and instrument outputs for the full ZRC-ND Phase A matrix.
allowed_roots.scope: ZRC-ND Phase A full local capture

allowed_roots.purpose: Local instrument exports, images, worksheets, and biological assay records for NHI-PEDOT H-B/H-C coupon gates.
Long-duration MEA, neural health, stimulus-recovery, imaging, and material-integrity records for NHI-PEDOT.
Biological assay records, imaging, MEA outputs, and worksheets for ZRC-ND conditioned-medium follow-up gates.

allowed_roots.purpose: Minimal source files for the smoke-tranche H-A pipeline rehearsal.
Minimal source files for the smoke-tranche ZRC-ND pipeline rehearsal.
Calibration or standard-check files referenced by pH, conductivity, temperature, osmometer, image, mass, or dimension records.
Bench logs, pipetting worksheets, chain-of-custody exports, and operator worksheets.
Recipe records, supplier CoAs, sample labels, coating logs, and build sheets.
Original external lab exports, reports, images, and worksheets referenced by returned H-A rows.
Original external lab exports, reports, images, and worksheets referenced by returned ZRC-ND rows.

boundary: This manifest is a provenance guardrail. It creates drop locations and policy only; it does not create measured evidence.

expected_source_classes.notes: Raw meter export is preferred; display photo must be time-stamped or paired with a worksheet.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, measurement date, instrument_id or calibration record

expected_source_classes.notes: Include calibration or standard-check evidence for media-range measurements.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, measurement date, instrument_id or standard-check record

expected_source_classes.notes: External lab report/export must reconcile each returned value to a run_id.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, mOsm/kg value, vendor or osmometer identifier

expected_source_classes.notes: A single incubator log can support multiple run_ids if the covered time window is explicit.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id or batch window, date/time, temperature source

expected_source_classes.notes: Keep raw images plus the scoring worksheet or vendor image-analysis report.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, imaging/scoring method, operator or vendor

expected_source_classes.notes: Worksheet must show enough raw dimensions, area, volume, or mass to reproduce the reported value.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, pre/post measurement basis, method, operator

expected_source_classes.notes: Used for setup metadata and transfer provenance; not a substitute for instrument output when a measured value is present.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id or sample_id, operator, date, transfer or exposure event

expected_source_classes.notes: Supplier/build records are provenance only; they do not become performance evidence by themselves.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: lot, recipe, CoA, label, or build identifier

expected_source_classes.notes: Keep raw MEA/electrochemical export plus the analysis worksheet when values are derived.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, measurement date, instrument_id, channel/electrode mapping, and analysis method

expected_source_classes.notes: Assay summaries must cite raw plate-reader, imaging, or MEA-derived files, not transcribed notes alone.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, culture model, assay date, operator or vendor, instrument_id or imaging/export method

expected_source_classes.notes: Keep raw analyzer, plate-reader, ELISA, or vendor chemistry export with enough metadata to reconcile each analyte to run_id.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, analyte, assay date, instrument_id or vendor report id, calibration/standard curve record

expected_source_classes.notes: Flow resistance and bubble-event records must preserve raw pressure/flow or imaging/inspection evidence, not only pass/fail transcription.
expected_source_classes.required_metadata: run_id, flow/pressure method, instrument_id, time window, calculation method

policy.not_evidence: Emails, quotes, verbal notes, vendor capability replies, fixtures, synthetic data, and placeholders are never measured evidence.
